items.title: Plant-Based Dietary Patterns and Risk of Alzheimer Disease and Related Dementias in the Multiethnic Cohort Study.
items.abstract: Plant-based diets have been linked to slower cognitive decline, but data on long-term dietary changes and from diverse populations are limited. The primary aim of this study was to examine plant-based dietary patterns and their change over time in relation to Alzheimer disease and related dementias (ADRDs). This prospective longitudinal analysis of the Multiethnic Cohort Study, based in Hawaii and California (primarily Los Angeles County), included data on African American, Japanese American, Latino, Native Hawaiian, and White participants who completed food frequency questionnaires at baseline (1993-1996; age 45-75 years) and at 10-year follow-up (2003-2008) and whose Medicare claims were linked to identify incident ADRDs. A priori indices for the overall plant-based diet index (PDI), the healthful plant-based diet index (hPDI), and the unhealthful plant-based diet index (uPDI) were analyzed in Cox regression models for ADRD. The analysis included 92,849 participants (mean age 59.2 years, 55.1% female, 21,478 with ADRDs) for the baseline diet and 45,065 participants (8,360 with ADRDs) for the 10-year dietary change. For the baseline diet, comparing the highest vs lowest quintile, PDI and hPDI were associated with 12% (hazard ratio [HR] 0.88; 95% CI 0.85-0.92) and 7% (HR 0.93; 95% CI 0.89-0.97) lower risks of ADRD, respectively, whereas uPDI was related to a 6% higher risk (HR 1.06; 95% CI 1.01-1.10). For the dietary change over time, the strongest association with ADRD was observed for uPDI rather than for PDI or hPDI. Compared with those with a stable score (<0.5 SD change), participants with a large increase in uPDI (≥1 SD) showed a 25% higher risk (HR 1.25; 95% CI 1.15-1.36) and those with a large decrease in uPDI showed an 11% lower risk (HR 0.89; 95% CI 0.84-0.94). The associations between the plant-based diet indices and ADRD were generally similar by age group (<60 vs ≥60 years at baseline), race and ethnicity, or  These findings suggest that adopting plant-based diets, specifically refraining from low-quality plant-based diets, even at an older age, is associated with a lower risk of ADRDs.
items.summary_ja:
背景：植物由来の食事パターンは認知機能の低下抑制と関連が示唆されているが、多様な人種集団における長期的な食事変化と認知症リスクの関連は不明である。  
方法：ハワイとカリフォルニアを拠点とする多民族コホート研究において、アフリカ系アメリカ人、日本人アメリカ人、ラテン系、ネイティブハワイアン、白人の92,849名（平均年齢59.2歳）が1993-1996年と10年後の2003-2008年に食事頻度調査を実施。メディケア請求データと連結し、アルツハイマー病および関連認知症（ADRD）の発症を追跡。植物ベースの食事指数（PDI）、健康的植物ベース食指数（hPDI）、非健康的植物ベース食指数（uPDI）を用いてCox回帰分析を行った。  
結果：ベースラインでPDIとhPDIの高い群はADRDリスクがそれぞれ12％、7％低く、uPDIの高い群は6％リスクが高かった。10年間の食事変化では、uPDIの増加が25％リスク上昇、減少が11％リスク低下と最も強い関連を示した。年齢、人種、民族別でも類似の傾向が認められた。  
結論：特に質の低い植物ベース食を避けることは、高齢期でもADRDリスク低減に寄与する可能性がある。
items.summary_short_ja: 多民族コホート研究において、植物性食品中心の食事パターンとアルツハイマー病・関連認知症（ADRD）のリスクを調査した。健康的な植物ベースの食事（hPDI）はADRDリスクを7～12％低減し、不健康な植物ベースの食事（uPDI）はリスクを6～25％増加させた。特にuPDIの増減がリスクに強く影響し、年齢や人種を問わず同様の傾向が認められた。質の高い植物性食の継続的な摂取がADRD予防に有効と示唆される。

items.title: Effect of Cognitive Reserve on Age at Symptom Onset and Cognitive Decline in Individuals With Dominantly Inherited Alzheimer Disease.
items.abstract: Cognitive reserve has been shown to modulate the onset and progression of Alzheimer disease (AD) symptoms. Although its role in sporadic AD is well-studied, how cognitive reserve influences the timing and progression of symptoms in dominantly inherited AD (DIAD) remains unclear. This study aimed to quantify cognitive reserve in DIAD carriers and test whether higher cognitive reserve is associated with later symptom onset and slower functional decline. We analyzed data from the Dominantly Inherited Alzheimer's Network study. Cognitive reserve was modeled using a residual-based latent variable approach, decomposing cognitive performance into demographic (CogD), biomarker (CogB), and reserve or residual (CogR) components. Primary outcomes were age at clinical symptom onset (CDR >0) and longitudinal change in the Clinical Dementia Rating-Sum of Boxes (CDR-SBs). Data were analyzed using Cox proportional hazards models and linear mixed-effects models, adjusting for estimated years from onset (EYO). A total of 710 Dominantly Inherited Alzheimer Network (DIAN) participants were included in the analysis, comprising 271 non-DIAD carriers (nMC), 284 asymptomatic DIAD carriers (aMC), and 155 symptomatic DIAD carriers. In asymptomatic carriers, using a zero-inflation model adjusted for EYO showed that a 1 SD increase in the reserve component (CogR) was associated with a 4.06-fold increase in the odds of being clinically unimpaired (CDR-SB = 0; 95% CI 1.84-8.95). Similarly, a 1 SD increase in the demographic (CogD) and biomarker (CogB) components increased the odds of being CDR-SB = 0 by 2.60 (95% CI 1.10-6.16) and 5.16 (95% CI 2.00-13.33), respectively. Among symptomatic carriers, only the reserve and the biomarker components were significant. A 1 SD increase in CogR was associated with a 0.81-fold reduction in baseline CDR-SB score (95% CI 0.72-0.92), and a 1 SD increase in CogB was associated with a 0.60-fold reduction in CDR-SB (95% CI 0.50-0.71). Our findings indicate that higher cognitive reserve values are associated with delayed conversion to mild cognitive impairment and slower progression on clinical dementia rating scales. These findings suggest that cognitive reserve plays a protective role in modifying the clinical trajectory of genetically determined AD.
items.summary_ja:
背景：認知予備力（cognitive reserve）はアルツハイマー病（AD）の症状発現や進行に影響を与えることが知られているが、遺伝性AD（DIAD）におけるその役割は不明であった。  
方法：Dominantly Inherited Alzheimer's Network（DIAN）研究のデータ710例（非保因者271例、無症状保因者284例、症候性保因者155例）を用い、認知機能を人口統計学的要因（CogD）、バイオマーカー（CogB）、予備力成分（CogR）に分解。症状発現年齢と臨床認知症評価尺度（CDR-SB）の経時変化をCox比例ハザードモデルおよび線形混合効果モデルで解析した。  
結果：無症状保因者では、CogRの1標準偏差増加が臨床的無症状状態（CDR-SB=0）である確率を4.06倍に増加させた。CogDおよびCogBもそれぞれ2.60倍、5.16倍の増加を示した。症候性保因者ではCogRとCogBが有意で、CogRの増加はCDR-SBスコアの低下（0.81倍）、CogBの増加はさらに顕著な低下（0.60倍）と関連した。  
結論：認知予備力の高さは遺伝性ADにおける症状発現の遅延および認知機能低下の進行抑制に寄与し、遺伝的に決定されたADの臨床経過を修飾する保護因子として重要であることが示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、優性遺伝性アルツハイマー病（DIAD）における認知予備力（cognitive reserve）が症状発現年齢や認知機能低下に与える影響を検証した。710名のDIAD関連者を対象に、認知予備力を人口統計学的要因、バイオマーカー、残差成分に分解し解析。認知予備力が高いほど症状発現が遅れ、臨床的認知機能低下の進行も緩やかであることが示された。認知予備力は遺伝性ADの臨床経過修飾に保護的役割を果たすと結論づけられる。

items.title: Efficacy of Pyridostigmine in Myasthenia Gravis: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Crossover Trial.
items.abstract: Pyridostigmine, an acetylcholinesterase inhibitor, is a symptomatic drug approved for the treatment of myasthenia gravis (MG), but no randomized controlled trials substantiate its widespread use. We aimed to assess the efficacy and cost utility of pyridostigmine in patients with anti-acetylcholine receptor-positive MG (AChR MG). A randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled crossover trial was conducted at Leiden University Medical Center, a tertiary center for the treatment of MG in the Netherlands. Main eligibility criteria were current use of pyridostigmine and a stable dose of other MG treatments. Participants were assigned to a sequence of 2 treatment periods for 5 days separated by a 2-day washout, in which patients either first received placebo and then pyridostigmine, or vice versa. Pyridostigmine dosing matched each participant's prestudy regimen. The primary outcome was change in the Myasthenia Gravis Impairment Index (MGII) score. Secondary efficacy outcome measures included the Myasthenia Gravis Activities of Daily Living (MG-ADL) scale, the Quantitative Myasthenia Gravis (QMG) score, and the revised 15-item Myasthenia Gravis Quality of Life (MG-QOL15r) questionnaire. For the post hoc cost-utility analysis, a mathematical model was developed to translate the observed study results into long-term annual effect on societal costs and quality-adjusted life years (QALYs). A total of 19 patients (median age 59 years, 58% female) were recruited between March 23, 2023, and February 21, 2024. The estimated mean difference in the MGII score between pyridostigmine and placebo interventions was 5.3 (95% CI 1.9-8.7,  This trial showed that, in patients with AChR MG chronically treated with pyridostigmine, pyridostigmine demonstrated benefit over placebo across all efficacy outcome measures and substantially reduced societal costs. The trial was registered at EudraCT (2021-004110-20, registration date: July 12, 2022) and ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT05919407, registration date: June 16, 2023). First patient enrolled: March 23, 2023. This study provides Class I evidence that, in adults with AChR ab-positive ocular or generalized MG on stable standard-of-care therapy and currently using pyridostigmine, pyridostigmine improves MG symptoms compared with placebo.
items.summary_ja:
背景：重症筋無力症（MG）は抗アセチルコリン受容体陽性患者に対し、ピリドスチグミンが広く使用されているが、ランダム化比較試験による有効性の裏付けは不足していた。  
方法：オランダのライデン大学医療センターで、ピリドスチグミンを現在使用中かつ他の治療が安定している19名の患者を対象に、二重盲検プラセボ対照クロスオーバー試験を実施。各患者は5日間のピリドスチグミン投与期間と5日間のプラセボ投与期間を2日間のウォッシュアウトを挟んで順序を変えて受けた。主要評価項目はMyasthenia Gravis Impairment Index（MGII）の変化。副次評価にはMG-ADL、QMGスコア、MG-QOL15rを用いた。  
結果：MGIIスコアの平均差はピリドスチグミン群でプラセボ群より5.3ポイント改善（95%CI 1.9-8.7）であり、全ての評価指標で有意な改善を示した。さらに、長期的な社会的コストも大幅に削減された。  
結論：抗AChR陽性MG患者の標準治療下でのピリドスチグミン使用は、プラセボと比較して症状を有意に改善し、社会的コスト削減にも寄与することがClass Iエビデンスとして示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本ランダム化二重盲検プラセボ対照クロスオーバー試験は、抗アセチルコリン受容体陽性重症筋無力症（AChR MG）患者19名を対象にピリドスチグミンの有効性を検証した。結果、ピリドスチグミンはプラセボに比べて症状改善（MGIIスコア差5.3）を示し、日常生活機能や生活の質も向上させた。また、社会的コストを大幅に削減することが示された。安定した標準治療下でのピリドスチグミンの使用は、AChR MG患者の症状改善に有効であることがClass Iエビデンスとして示された。

items.title: Efficacy and Safety of Amifampridine in Myasthenia Gravis: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Crossover Trial.
items.abstract: Amifampridine, a short-acting potassium-channel blocker, is the first-line treatment for Lambert-Eaton myasthenic syndrome. Its benefit as add-on to pyridostigmine in acetylcholine receptor (AChR)-positive myasthenia gravis (MG) has been proposed, but no randomized controlled trials have been conducted. We aimed to evaluate the efficacy and safety of amifampridine in AChR-MG with insufficient symptom control on pyridostigmine. A randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled crossover trial was conducted at Leiden University Medical Center, a tertiary center for the treatment of MG in the Netherlands, as part 2 of the IMPACT-MG trial. Eligible patients had either completed part 1 (pyridostigmine vs placebo) or failed the initial 2-day pyridostigmine washout, and had an Myasthenia Gravis Impairment Index (MGII) score >10. Participants were randomized (1:1:1) to 1 of 3 treatment sequences. Each treatment period lasted 5 days, with a 2-day washout between treatments, during which participants received either 30 mg or 60 mg of amifampridine modified release, or placebo. The primary outcome was the difference in MGII score between the 2 amifampridine dosages and placebo. Pharmacokinetics, safety, and tolerability were assessed throughout the trial. Between March 2023 and April 2024, 20 patients were enrolled (median age 60 years, 55% female). For the MGII score, the estimated mean differences were -1.0 (95% CI -4.1 to 2.0,  The addition of amifampridine to pyridostigmine was not superior to treatment with pyridostigmine alone and was associated with a higher incidence of adverse events. The trial was registered at EudraCT (2021-004110-20, registration date: July 12, 2022) and ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT05919407, registration date: June 16, 2023). First patient enrolled: March 23, 2023. This study provides Class I evidence that in patients with AChRAb+ MG, the addition of amifampridine to pyridostigmine was not superior to treatment with pyridostigmine alone and was associated with a higher incidence of adverse events.
items.summary_ja:
背景：アミファンプリジンはランバート・イートン筋無力症候群の第一選択薬であり、アセチルコリン受容体陽性重症筋無力症（AChR-MG）においてピリドスチグミンへの追加効果が提案されているが、無作為化比較試験は未実施であった。  
方法：オランダのライデン大学医療センターで、AChR-MG患者20名（MGIIスコア＞10）を対象に、アミファンプリジン30mg・60mgおよびプラセボを用いた二重盲検プラセボ対照クロスオーバー試験を実施。各治療期間は5日間、治療間に2日間のウォッシュアウトを設けた。主要評価項目はMGIIスコアの変化であり、安全性と薬物動態も評価した。  
結果：アミファンプリジン追加群のMGIIスコア改善はプラセボ群と有意差がなく（平均差−1.0、95%CI −4.1～2.0）、副作用の発現率は高かった。  
結論：AChR抗体陽性MG患者において、ピリドスチグミン単独治療に対しアミファンプリジンの追加は有効性を示さず、副作用リスクが増加するため推奨されない。
items.summary_short_ja: アセチルコリン受容体陽性重症筋無力症（AChR-MG）患者において、ピリドスチグミン単独治療にアミファンプリジンを追加する効果と安全性を検証した無作為二重盲検プラセボ対照クロスオーバー試験を実施。20例を対象に評価した結果、アミファンプリジン追加は症状改善に優れず、副作用の発現率が高かった。従って、AChR-MG治療においてアミファンプリジンの追加は推奨されない。

items.title: Extent of Tau and Its Cognitive Implications in Patients With Cerebral Amyloid Angiopathy Without Cognitive Impairment.
items.abstract: Despite a well-established amyloid-tau neurodegeneration cascade in Alzheimer disease (AD), the extent and mechanistic relevance of tau pathology in cerebral amyloid angiopathy (CAA), a disease of vascular amyloid deposition, remain unclear. Focusing on patients with CAA without cognitive impairment to minimize concurrent AD pathology, we hypothesized that tau extent would be greater in patients with CAA than in healthy controls (HCs), largely attributable to amyloid burden, but it would not be associated with CAA-related imaging markers or cognitive scores in CAA. This cross-sectional study included patients with CAA and age-matched and sex-matched HCs, none of whom had cognitive impairment or dementia. All participants underwent brain MRI, Pittsburgh compound B (PiB)-PET for amyloid, and  The mean age of patients with CAA (n = 50) was 70.3 ± 7.6 years and of HCs was 69.7 ± 7.5 years ( Our results suggest that tau extent is mainly driven by age and vascular amyloid among patients with CAA and that tau extent is not related to CAA-related imaging markers or cognitive scores. These findings further support the view that tau does not affect CAA-specific disease mechanisms among patients with CAA without cognitive impairment.
items.summary_ja: 背景：アルツハイマー病（AD）ではアミロイドとタウの神経変性連鎖が知られているが、血管性アミロイド沈着を特徴とする脳アミロイド血管症（CAA）におけるタウ病理の範囲やその意義は不明である。方法：認知障害のないCAA患者（n=50）と年齢・性別を一致させた健常対照群（HC）を対象に、脳MRI、Pittsburgh化合物B（PiB）PETによるアミロイド評価を行い、タウの範囲と認知機能との関連を検討した。結果：CAA患者の平均年齢は70.3歳、HCは69.7歳であり、タウの範囲はCAA患者でHCより大きかったが、これは主に年齢と血管性アミロイド負荷によるものであった。一方、タウの範囲はCAA特有の画像マーカーや認知機能スコアとは関連しなかった。結論：認知障害のないCAA患者において、タウの広がりは主に年齢と血管性アミロイドに依存し、CAA特有の病態や認知機能には影響しないことが示された。これは、タウがCAAの病態メカニズムに直接関与しないことを支持する知見である。
items.summary_short_ja: 認知障害のない脳アミロイド血管症（CAA）患者と健常者を比較した結果、CAA患者のタウ蛋白蓄積は主に加齢と血管性アミロイド負荷によって増加するが、CAA特有の画像マーカーや認知機能とは関連しなかった。これは、認知障害のないCAA患者においてタウ病理がCAAの病態進行に直接関与しないことを示唆している。

items.title: Role of Tocilizumab in Severe CNS Inflammatory Presentations in Children.
items.abstract: Anti-interleukin 6 receptor (anti-IL6R) therapies have been proven to reduce relapse rates in patients with neuromyelitis optica spectrum disorder and are under investigation in myelin oligodendrocyte glycoprotein antibody-associated disease (MOGAD). One anti-IL6R therapy, tocilizumab (TCZ), has been reported as a treatment option in cases of life-threatening MOGAD attacks. The aim of this study was to further evaluate the safety and effectiveness of IV-TCZ for acute and severe CNS inflammatory events in children. This retrospective study reviewed medical records of children younger than 18 years treated with IV-TCZ for acute-severe CNS inflammation at the Children's Hospital of Philadelphia between 2022 and 2025, excluding those with new-onset refractory status epilepticus without evidence of CNS inflammation. Clinical features, imaging, serum and CSF profiles, treatments, and outcomes were assessed, with primary evaluation of TCZ response within 72 hours postadministration. Eleven patients were included, of whom 8 demonstrated clinical improvement within 72 hours of IV-TCZ administration. Outcomes included rapid intracranial pressure reduction, recovery in relapsing optic neuritis and myelitis, and improvement in RANBP2-related acute necrotizing encephalopathy. No acute adverse effects were observed. One patient died despite immunotherapy. CSF cytokine panels showed elevated IL-6 in 5 patients, with normal serum IL-6 concentrations. Three of the 5 showed a response to TCZ. TCZ may offer potential benefit in select neuroinflammatory conditions, although clinical trials are needed to confirm its efficacy and guide use in such scenarios. This study provides Class IV evidence that TCZ improves clinical outcomes in children with acute-severe CNS inflammatory events.
items.summary_ja:
背景：抗インターロイキン6受容体（anti-IL6R）療法は視神経脊髄炎スペクトラム障害（NMOSD）で再発率を低減することが示されており、ミエリンオリゴデンドロサイト糖タンパク抗体関連疾患（MOGAD）でも検討されている。トシリズマブ（TCZ）は重篤なMOGAD発作の治療選択肢として報告されている。  
方法：2022～2025年にフィラデルフィア小児病院で急性重症中枢神経系（CNS）炎症を呈した18歳未満の小児11例の医療記録を遡及的に解析し、TCZ投与後72時間以内の臨床反応を評価した。新規発症の難治性てんかん重積症例は除外した。  
結果：11例中8例がTCZ投与後72時間以内に臨床的改善を示し、頭蓋内圧の迅速な低下、再発性視神経炎・脊髄炎の回復、RANBP2関連急性壊死性脳症の改善が認められた。急性副作用は観察されなかったが、1例は免疫療法中に死亡した。髄液中IL-6は5例で上昇し、そのうち3例がTCZに反応した。  
結論：TCZは選択された神経炎症性疾患において有用な可能性があり、小児の急性重症CNS炎症イベントに対する臨床転帰を改善することを示すClass IVエビデンスを提供するが、効果検証と使用指針確立のため臨床試験が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、小児の急性重度中枢神経炎症に対する抗IL-6受容体薬トシリズマブ（TCZ）の安全性と有効性を検討した。11例中8例が投与後72時間以内に臨床改善を示し、頭蓋内圧の迅速低下や再発性視神経炎・脊髄炎の回復が認められた。副作用はなく、一部で髄液中IL-6上昇が観察された。TCZは特定の神経炎症疾患に有用である可能性が示唆されるが、さらなる臨床試験が必要である。

items.title: Tenecteplase for Acute Non-Large Vessel Occlusion 4.5 to 24 Hours After Ischemic Stroke: The OPTION Randomized Clinical Trial.
items.abstract: The efficacy and safety of intravenous tenecteplase in non-large vessel occlusion acute ischemic stroke beyond 4.5 hours after symptom onset remain uncertain. To assess the efficacy and safety of intravenous tenecteplase administered 4.5 to 24 hours after stroke onset in patients with non-large vessel occlusion and salvageable brain tissue. This randomized, open-label, blinded end-point clinical trial was conducted at 48 centers in China. A total of 566 patients with non-large vessel occlusion stroke and evidence of potentially salvageable tissue determined on perfusion imaging presenting within 4.5 to 24 hours of the time last seen well were recruited between June 2, 2023, and August 4, 2025 (final follow-up, October 28, 2025). Patients were randomly assigned 1:1 using a minimization algorithm to receive intravenous tenecteplase (0.25 mg/kg; maximum dose, 25 mg; n = 282) or standard medical treatment (n = 284). The primary efficacy outcome was an excellent functional outcome, defined as a score of 0 or 1 on the modified Rankin Scale at 90 days. Safety outcomes included symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage within 36 hours and mortality within 90 days. Among the 570 patients randomized, 566 were included in the primary analysis (median age, 68 [IQR, 59-75] years; 196 female [34.6%]). An excellent functional outcome was observed in 123 of 282 patients (43.6%) in the tenecteplase group and 97 of 284 (34.2%) in the control group (risk ratio, 1.28 [95% CI, 1.04-1.57]; P = .02). The incidence of symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage at 2.8% was higher with tenecteplase than with standard medical treatment at 0% (risk difference, 2.85% [95% CI, 1.16%-5.54%]; P = .004), and the mortality at 90 days was 5.0% and 3.2%, respectively (risk ratio, 1.57 [95% CI, 0.69-3.57]; P = .28). Among patients with non-large vessel occlusion acute ischemic stroke and salvageable brain tissue, intravenous tenecteplase administered 4.5 to 24 hours after onset resulted in a greater likelihood of an excellent functional outcome at 90 days than standard care but had an increased risk of symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage. ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier: NCT05752916.
items.summary_ja:
背景：発症後4.5時間を超える非大血管閉塞型急性虚血性脳卒中に対する静脈内テネクテプラーゼの有効性と安全性は不明であった。  
方法：中国の48施設で、発症後4.5～24時間以内に救済可能な脳組織を有する非大血管閉塞脳卒中患者566名を対象に、テネクテプラーゼ投与群（0.25 mg/kg、最大25 mg、282名）と標準治療群（284名）に1:1で無作為割付けし、90日後の機能的良好転帰（修正Rankinスケール0または1）を主要評価項目とした。  
結果：テネクテプラーゼ群の43.6%が良好転帰を示し、標準治療群の34.2%を有意に上回った（リスク比1.28、P=0.02）。一方、症候性頭蓋内出血はテネクテプラーゼ群で2.8%、標準治療群で0%と有意に増加（P=0.004）し、90日死亡率は両群で有意差なかった。  
結論：非大血管閉塞型脳卒中患者において、発症後4.5～24時間の間にテネクテプラーゼを投与すると、機能的良好転帰の可能性が高まるが、症候性頭蓋内出血リスクも増加することが示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 非大血管閉塞の急性虚血性脳卒中患者を対象に、発症4.5～24時間後に静脈内テネクテプラーゼ投与の有効性と安全性を検証した。566例を無作為に分け、テネクテプラーゼ群は90日後の優れた機能的回復率が43.6％で対照群の34.2％を上回ったが、症候性頭蓋内出血リスクも2.8％と有意に増加した。死亡率に差はなかった。
